name: oyun-multiplayer
description: 3D çim alanı - TypeScript multiplayer oyunu (tek komutla client + server)

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.start: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c yellow,cyan "npm start --prefix server" "npm run preview --prefix client"
